member.name: T:CL.NetUtils.Localization.NetUtilsStrings
member.summary: Localized string resources for the CL.NetUtils library.

member.name: T:CL.NetUtils.Models.NetUtilsConfig
member.summary: Main configuration model for the CL.NetUtils library. Serialized as config.netutils.json in the library's config directory.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.NetUtilsConfig.Enabled
member.summary: Whether the NetUtils library is enabled.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.NetUtilsConfig.Dnsbl
member.summary: DNSBL blacklist-checking configuration.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.NetUtilsConfig.GeoIp
member.summary: IP geolocation (GeoIP) configuration.

member.name: T:CL.NetUtils.Models.DnsblConfig
member.summary: Configuration for DNS blacklist (DNSBL) checking.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.DnsblConfig.Enabled
member.summary: Whether DNSBL checking is enabled.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.DnsblConfig.Ipv4Services
member.summary: Primary DNSBL services to query for IPv4 addresses.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.DnsblConfig.Ipv4FallbackServices
member.summary: Fallback DNSBL services for IPv4 addresses.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.DnsblConfig.Ipv6Services
member.summary: Primary DNSBL services to query for IPv6 addresses.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.DnsblConfig.Ipv6FallbackServices
member.summary: Fallback DNSBL services for IPv6 addresses.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.DnsblConfig.TimeoutSeconds
member.summary: DNS query timeout in seconds.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.DnsblConfig.ParallelQueries
member.summary: Whether to run DNSBL queries in parallel.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.DnsblConfig.DetailedLogging
member.summary: Whether to enable detailed per-service logging.

member.name: T:CL.NetUtils.Models.GeoIpConfig
member.summary: Configuration for IP geolocation using the MaxMind GeoIP2 database.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.GeoIpConfig.Enabled
member.summary: Whether the GeoIP service is enabled.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.GeoIpConfig.DatabasePath
member.summary: Explicit path to the .mmdb database file. When empty the path is resolved automatically from the library data directory.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.GeoIpConfig.AutoUpdate
member.summary: Whether to automatically download/update the database on startup.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.GeoIpConfig.AccountId
member.summary: MaxMind account ID used for authenticated downloads.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.GeoIpConfig.LicenseKey
member.summary: MaxMind license key used for authenticated downloads.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.GeoIpConfig.DownloadUrl
member.summary: URL used to download the GeoIP database archive.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.GeoIpConfig.DatabaseType
member.summary: MaxMind database type (e.g. GeoLite2-City).

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.GeoIpConfig.TimeoutSeconds
member.summary: HTTP download timeout in seconds.

member.name: T:CL.NetUtils.Models.IpAddressType
member.summary: IP address protocol family.

member.name: F:CL.NetUtils.Models.IpAddressType.IPv4
member.summary: IPv4 address (e.g. 192.168.1.1).

member.name: F:CL.NetUtils.Models.IpAddressType.IPv6
member.summary: IPv6 address (e.g. 2001:db8::1).

member.name: F:CL.NetUtils.Models.IpAddressType.Unknown
member.summary: Address type could not be determined.

member.name: T:CL.NetUtils.Models.DnsblCheckResult
member.summary: Result of a DNSBL blacklist check for a single IP address.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.DnsblCheckResult.IpAddress
member.summary: The IP address that was checked.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.DnsblCheckResult.IsBlacklisted
member.summary: Whether the IP address was found on at least one blacklist.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.DnsblCheckResult.MatchedService
member.summary: The DNSBL service that matched, or when not blacklisted.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.DnsblCheckResult.AddressType
member.summary: Protocol family of the checked address.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.DnsblCheckResult.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Error message when the check itself failed; on success.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.DnsblCheckResult.CheckedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp of when the check was performed.

member.name: M:CL.NetUtils.Models.DnsblCheckResult.Blacklisted(System.String,CL.NetUtils.Models.IpAddressType,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a result indicating the IP is blacklisted by the given service.

member.name: M:CL.NetUtils.Models.DnsblCheckResult.NotBlacklisted(System.String,CL.NetUtils.Models.IpAddressType)
member.summary: Creates a result indicating the IP passed all blacklist checks.

member.name: M:CL.NetUtils.Models.DnsblCheckResult.Error(System.String,CL.NetUtils.Models.IpAddressType,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an error result when the check could not be completed.

member.name: T:CL.NetUtils.Models.IpLocationResult
member.summary: Result of an IP geolocation lookup.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.IpLocationResult.IpAddress
member.summary: The IP address that was looked up.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.IpLocationResult.CountryName
member.summary: Full country name, or when unavailable.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.IpLocationResult.CountryCode
member.summary: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, or when unavailable.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.IpLocationResult.CityName
member.summary: City name, or when unavailable.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.IpLocationResult.SubdivisionName
member.summary: State / province / subdivision name, or when unavailable.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.IpLocationResult.PostalCode
member.summary: Postal / ZIP code, or when unavailable.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.IpLocationResult.Latitude
member.summary: Geographic latitude, or when unavailable.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.IpLocationResult.Longitude
member.summary: Geographic longitude, or when unavailable.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.IpLocationResult.TimeZone
member.summary: IANA time zone identifier (e.g. Europe/Copenhagen), or .

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.IpLocationResult.Isp
member.summary: ISP / organization name, or when unavailable.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.IpLocationResult.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Error message when the lookup failed; on success.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.IpLocationResult.IsSuccessful
member.summary: when the lookup succeeded and country information is available.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.Models.IpLocationResult.LookedUpAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp of when the lookup was performed.

member.name: M:CL.NetUtils.Models.IpLocationResult.NotFound(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a result indicating the IP was not found in the database.

member.name: M:CL.NetUtils.Models.IpLocationResult.Error(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an error result when the lookup could not be completed.

member.name: T:CL.NetUtils.NetUtilsLibrary
member.summary:
CL.NetUtils — CodeLogic library providing DNSBL blacklist checking and IP geolocation via the MaxMind GeoIP2 database.
Lifecycle:
Configure — registers and .
Initialize — loads config, creates and optionally .
Start — logs that the library is ready.
Stop — disposes the database reader.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.NetUtilsLibrary.Dnsbl
member.summary: The DNSBL checker service.
member.exception: Thrown when the library has not been initialized or is disabled.

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.NetUtilsLibrary.GeoIp
member.summary: The GeoIP lookup service.
member.exception: Thrown when the GeoIP service is not available (database absent, not configured, or disabled).

member.name: P:CL.NetUtils.NetUtilsLibrary.HasGeoIp
member.summary: when the GeoIP service has been successfully initialized.

member.name: T:CL.NetUtils.Services.DnsblChecker
member.summary: Checks IP addresses against DNS-based blacklists (DNSBLs). Supports both IPv4 and IPv6 addresses, primary and fallback service lists.

member.name: M:CL.NetUtils.Services.DnsblChecker.#ctor(CL.NetUtils.Models.DnsblConfig,CodeLogic.Core.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Initializes a new .
member.param: Optional logger; pass to suppress logging.

member.name: M:CL.NetUtils.Services.DnsblChecker.CheckIpAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks whether appears on any configured DNSBL. Local/private addresses are skipped and returned as not blacklisted.
member.param: The IP address string to check (IPv4 or IPv6).

member.name: T:CL.NetUtils.Services.GeoIpService
member.summary: Provides IP geolocation using the MaxMind GeoIP2 / GeoLite2 database. Supports automatic download of the database when credentials are configured.

member.name: M:CL.NetUtils.Services.GeoIpService.#ctor(CL.NetUtils.Models.GeoIpConfig,CodeLogic.Core.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new .
member.param: Library data directory used to resolve the database path when is not set.

member.name: M:CL.NetUtils.Services.GeoIpService.InitializeAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Ensures the database file exists (downloading it when needed and permitted), then opens the .
member.exception: Thrown when the database file is absent and could not be obtained.

member.name: M:CL.NetUtils.Services.GeoIpService.LookupIpAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Looks up geolocation information for the given IP address.
member.param: Optional cancellation token (reserved for future async lookup).
member.returns: An with location data or an error description.

member.name: M:CL.NetUtils.Services.GeoIpService.DownloadDatabaseAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads and extracts the MaxMind database archive using the configured credentials. Does nothing (logs a warning) when account credentials are absent.
